title: Elevated Glucose in Pregnancy - Gestational Diabetes
chief_complaint: 32-year-old G2P1 at 28 weeks with elevated 1-hour glucose challenge test (165 mg/dL). 3-hour OGTT confirms gestational diabetes. BMI 32. Family history of diabetes.

physical_exam.abdomen: Gravid uterus at 28cm, fetal heart 148 bpm

key_learning_points: Monitor fetal growth and amniotic fluid

patient_responses.diet: I eat a lot of sweets and rice

feedback.correct_message: Well diagnosed! GDM needs tight glucose control.
feedback.incorrect_message: This is GDM. The OGTT results confirm it.
feedback.attending_note: GDM: Dietary counseling (carbohydrate counting), glucose monitoring 4x/day (fasting + postprandial). Insulin if fasting >95 or 2h >120. Metformin alternative. Monitor fetal growth q4 weeks. Induction at 39-40 weeks if well-controlled.
